config.script:
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment ' standardowa implementacja kopiowania obiektów (ta sama baza) #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function std_copy(byref page, byref destStream) : std_copy = false if page.root is nothing then exit function end if
dim pEFM : set pEFM = doc_.getmodule(60272) dim pExportFilter : set pExportFilter = pEFM.new_exp_filter() dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj() pSO.attach destStream set pSO = pExportFilter.preprare_export_ex(pSO) pExportFilter.exportobj page.root #ifdef _DEBUG pExportFilter.done_export pSO,"c:\temp\copy.txt" #endif
std_copy = true end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment ' standardowa implementacja wklejania obiektów (ta sama baza) #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function std_paste(byref page,byref srcStream): std_paste=false dim rootobj : set rootobj = page.root
std_paste = std_paste_obj(rootobj , srcStream)
end function
dim g_nNoMatchTypeId : g_nNoMatchTypeId = 0 dim g_nMatchIdObj : g_nMatchIdObj = 0 function paste_object_matcher(byref pImpObject,byref pImportHandler) if pImpObject.typeid = g_nNoMatchTypeId then paste_object_matcher = g_nMatchIdObj else paste_object_matcher = pImpObject.idobj end if end function
function paste_environment_helper(byref pImpObject,byval idDestObj,byref pImportHandler) paste_environment_helper = 0 end function function paste_object_importer(byref pImportHandler,byref pImpObject,byref pDestStdObj)
select case pDestStdObj.type case TYPEID_N5DOKMAG if g_nNoMatchTypeId = pDestStdObj.type then if pImportHandler.resolve_ref(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,pImpObject("pRejestrDok")).eTyp <> _ pDestStdObj.pRejestrDok.eTyp then paste_object_importer = -5 exit function end if end if end select
paste_object_importer = pImportHandler.std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj)
end function
dim g_oM60211 : set g_oM60211 = doc_.getmodule(60211) dim g_std_field_translator : set g_std_field_translator = g_oM60211.get_translator()
function paste_field_translator(byref pDestStdObj, byref pFieldDef,byref varValue) paste_field_translator = true 'nie wklejaj pól unikalnych bo nie ma to sensu if pFieldDef.isunique() then paste_field_translator = false end if
'--- filtr na rejestr dokumentow pRejestrDok if pFieldDef.name = "zad_pRejestrDok" or pFieldDef.name = "pRejestrDok" or pFieldDef.name = "raka_pRejestrDok" then paste_field_translator = false end if
if pDestStdObj.type = TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ or pDestStdObj.type = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then if pFieldDef.name = "pTransakcja" or pFieldDef.name = "pRozlVAT" or pFieldDef.name = "sprzed_pDostawa" then paste_field_translator = false end if end if
'--- filtr na użytkownika rejestrującego if pFieldDef.name = "pUzytRej" or pFieldDef.name = "pt4_pUzytRej" or pFieldDef.name = "pt5_pUzytRej" or _ pFieldDef.name = "pt5l_pUzytRej" or pFieldDef.name = "pt11_pUzytRej" or pFieldDef.name = "vtue_pUzytRej" or _ pFieldDef.name = "raka_pUzytRej" or pFieldDef.name = "vat7_pUzytRej" or pFieldDef.name = "istt_pUzytRej" then paste_field_translator = false end if
'------------------- select case pDestStdObj.type case TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG if pFieldDef.name = "nNumDow" then paste_field_translator = false end if end select
if paste_field_translator then paste_field_translator = g_std_field_translator(pDestStdObj, pFieldDef, varValue) end if end function
function std_paste_obj(byref obj ,byref srcStream): std_paste_obj=false
if (not obj.isnew) then if (not obj.exlock()) then exit function end if end if
dim pImportModule: set pImportModule = doc_.getmodule(60145) dim pImportHandler : set pImportHandler = pImportModule.new_import_handler()
pImportHandler.set_field_translator getref("paste_field_translator") pImportHandler.required_init getref("paste_object_matcher"), _ getref("paste_environment_helper") pImportHandler.set_object_importer getref("paste_object_importer") g_nNoMatchTypeId = obj.type g_nMatchIdObj = obj.idobj pImportHandler.enablesave = false std_paste_obj = (pImportHandler.go(srcStream) = 0) if not std_paste_obj then trans_.message 0,0,pImportHandler.errordesc end if
end function
